title: INV-014 CAPA-003/004: Tighten SDLC Governance Controls

comment:
REVIEW: CR-100 v0.1 -- COMPLIANT. All review criteria verified with evidence.

FRONTMATTER: title = "INV-014 CAPA-003/004: Tighten SDLC Governance Controls" (present, non-empty). revision_summary = "Initial draft" (appropriate for v0.1; executable documents are self-authorizing per SOP-002 Section 8).

STRUCTURE: All 12 sections required by SOP-002 Section 6 are present: Purpose, Scope (Context, Changes Summary, Files Affected), Current State, Proposed State, Change Description (4 subsections), Justification, Impact Assessment (7.1-7.5 including Development Controls and Qualified State Continuity), Testing Summary, Implementation Plan (3 phases), Execution (14 EIs), Execution Summary, References.

PLACEHOLDER CONTENT: No {{...}} template placeholders found in pre-approved Sections 1-9. Execution-phase [BRACKETS] in Sections 10-12 are expected per template convention.

TRACEABILITY: All referenced documents verified against QMS -- INV-014 (v1.1 IN_EXECUTION, confirmed as parent), SOP-005 (v6.0 EFFECTIVE), TEMPLATE-CR (v9.0 EFFECTIVE), SOP-002 (v15.0 EFFECTIVE), SDLC-QMS-RS (v18.0 EFFECTIVE), SDLC-QMS-RTM (v23.0 EFFECTIVE). Version transitions in Section 7.2 (SOP-005 v6.0->v7.0, TEMPLATE-CR v9.0->v10.0, SOP-002 v15.0->v16.0) are consistent with current effective versions.

CHANGE DESCRIPTION VERIFICATION: All four TEMPLATE-CR "From" texts verified against actual TEMPLATE-CR content at the cited line numbers (104, 205, 273, 345) -- all match exactly. SOP-005 gaps at cited locations (line 128, 165, 184, 186) confirmed present. SOP-002 Section 7.3 confirmed missing PR verification bullet.

DEVELOPMENT CONTROLS (Section 7.4): Properly specifies .test-env/qms-cli/ as development location, branch cr-100, PreToolUse hook enforcement, qualification, CI, PR gate, and submodule update. All seven controls enumerated.

QUALIFIED STATE CONTINUITY (Section 7.5): Before CR: commit 5124b4a, RS v18.0, RTM v23.0, CLI-14.0. During/After: unchanged. The rationale that no RS/RTM update is needed (template content, not functional code with REQ-* requirements) is correct. Running the test suite confirms no regressions without adding new requirements.

IMPLEMENTATION PLAN / EI TABLE: 14 EIs covering pre-execution baseline (EI-1), QMS document changes (EI-2 through EI-7), seed execution branch workflow (EI-8 through EI-13), and post-execution baseline (EI-14). Critical ordering verified: EI-3 (SOP-005 EFFECTIVE) precedes EI-8 (seed work begins), ensuring the rules are in force before the work that must follow them. No VR column entries -- appropriate for procedural/template CR.

TU ASSESSMENT: No Technical Unit assignment required. This CR modifies procedural documents (SOPs) and a template. No application code or functional qms-cli code is changed. Falls entirely within QA procedural compliance domain.

FORMATTING: Consistent heading hierarchy, table formatting, code block usage, and bold emphasis throughout. No typos or grammatical errors found.

FINDING: No deficiencies identified. Recommend for approval.

POST-REVIEW: CR-100 v1.2 -- NON-COMPLIANT. One deficiency identified requiring correction before approval.

DEFICIENCY: Section 11 (Execution Summary) still contains the [EXECUTION_SUMMARY] placeholder (line 289). Per SOP-002 Section 6.11, this section requires an "overall narrative summarizing the execution after all EIs are complete. Include deviations from plan and final assessment." This placeholder should have been replaced with the execution narrative before routing for post-review.

All other post-review criteria are SATISFIED (detailed below). Correction of Section 11 is the only action required before re-routing.

---

QA POST-REVIEW CHECKLIST (per SOP-002 Section 7.3):

1. EXECUTION ITEMS: All 14 EIs show Task Outcome of Pass. No Fail outcomes. No VARs required. PASS.

2. BLOCKING VARs: No VARs exist. N/A.

3. DOCUMENTATION APPROVED: Three controlled documents modified under this CR:
   - SOP-005: verified v7.0 EFFECTIVE
   - TEMPLATE-CR: verified v10.0 EFFECTIVE
   - SOP-002: verified v16.0 EFFECTIVE
   All three are EFFECTIVE, not DRAFT or IN_REVIEW. PASS.

4. EVIDENCE DOCUMENTED: All 14 EI Execution Summary columns are filled with specific evidence (commit hashes, version numbers, test results, PR references). PASS (at EI level). Section 11 overall narrative: FAIL (placeholder remains).

5. SDLC PREREQUISITES: RS v18.0 EFFECTIVE, RTM v23.0 EFFECTIVE (verified via QMS status). No RS/RTM update needed per CR-100 Section 7.5 rationale (template content, not functional code). PASS.

6. VRs COMPLETE: No VR-flagged EIs. N/A.

7. REVISION_SUMMARY VERIFICATION:
   - SOP-005 revision_summary: "CR-100: Add development environment specification, PR mandate, file type scope, and direct commit prohibition (INV-014 CAPA-003)" -- references CR-100 per SOP-002 Section 8. PASS.
   - TEMPLATE-CR revision_summary: "CR-100: Replace vague development location language, add SOP-005 workflow reference for seed changes, add PR enforcement language (INV-014 CAPA-004)" -- references CR-100. PASS.
   - SOP-002 revision_summary: "CR-100: Add PR merge verification to Section 7.3 QA post-review checklist (INV-014 CAPA-003)" -- references CR-100. PASS.

8. SUBMODULE REACHABILITY (per SOP-005 Section 7.1.3): Execution branch commit 9dfd987 is reachable from qms-cli main branch via merge commit 2a32576. Verified via git branch --contains. Submodule pointer updated from 5124b4a to 2a32576. Verified via git submodule status. PASS.

9. PR MERGE VERIFICATION (per SOP-002 Section 7.3, new bullet): Commit 2a32576 is "Merge pull request #18 from whharris917/cr-100" -- confirmed GitHub PR merge, not direct commit. Verified via git log. PASS.

10. TEMPLATE ALIGNMENT (per SOP-002 Section 7.3): Seed TEMPLATE-CR at qms-cli/seed/templates/TEMPLATE-CR.md contains all four CAPA-004 changes at the correct locations (lines 104, 205, 273, 345). Content from example frontmatter onward matches QMS TEMPLATE-CR v10.0. revision_summary in both copies is identical. PASS.

11. PRE/POST EXECUTION BASELINES (per SOP-004 Section 5): Pre-execution commit 6673e10 ("CR-100 PRE_APPROVED") verified. Post-execution commit f40d773 ("CR-100 execution: SOP-005 v7.0, TEMPLATE-CR v10.0, SOP-002 v16.0, seed aligned via PR #18") verified. PASS.

12. EXECUTION COMMENT: One comment documenting hook .test-env/ allowlist fix during EI-8. Appropriately documented, no VAR required (operational adjustment, not a deviation from CR scope). PASS.

13. CRITICAL ORDERING: SOP-005 reached EFFECTIVE (EI-3) before seed work began (EI-8). PASS.

ACTION REQUIRED: Replace [EXECUTION_SUMMARY] placeholder in Section 11 with an overall execution narrative, then re-route for post-review.

POST-REVIEW (re-review): CR-100 v1.2 -- COMPLIANT. Prior deficiency corrected, all criteria satisfied.

DEFICIENCY RESOLUTION: Section 11 (Execution Summary) at line 289 now contains a comprehensive execution narrative replacing the [EXECUTION_SUMMARY] placeholder. The narrative covers: (1) all 14 EIs completed successfully, (2) Phase 1 document updates with specific versions (SOP-005 v7.0, TEMPLATE-CR v10.0, SOP-002 v16.0), (3) critical ordering confirmed (SOP-005 EFFECTIVE before seed work), (4) Phase 2 seed execution branch workflow with evidence (PR #18, commit 2a32576, 673 tests, CI passed), (5) seed/QMS alignment verified, (6) submodule pointer updated, (7) deviation from plan documented (qms-write-guard.py hook allowlist fix). Meets SOP-002 Section 6.11 requirements. PASS.

NO OTHER CHANGES: Document remains at v1.2. EI table, execution comments, and all other content unchanged from prior review. All 13 other post-review criteria verified in the prior review remain satisfied. No new deficiencies introduced.

FINDING: All post-review criteria now satisfied. Recommend for approval.
